detailedDescription: Modern detached 5 bedroom house in 1/3 acre plot in a prime location in St Merryn, PL28 Triple glazed * Large garden * Summer House * Integral Double Garage * Gas Central Heating * Designer Kitchen The Harbour Town of Padstow, some 3 miles away, offers water sport facilities on the Camel Estuary including sailing, windsurfing and water ski-ing. The Championship Links Golf Course of Trevose is 1 mile away. For full details click here .
